title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Account-level Genie One is now generally available**: Account-level Genie One now includes Databricks Apps, Domains, and Genie. See [Use Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/genie).
* **Updated workspace Genie One navigation**: The workspace Genie One left-hand navigation has been updated and now includes Genie Code chat history.
